prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 14013→13611→14608→12241→18480，2024 年大幅前移至 12241 名，但 2025 年因新高考选科分组（物理+化学组）导致位次大幅后移至 18480 名，近两年波动剧烈；2025 年基准约 18480 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2023 年均为 94 人，2024 年增至 104 人，2025 年 107 人；2026 年计划 115 人，较 2025 年扩招约 7.5%，扩招幅度较大，竞争有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 75 名，近年排名稳定在第 63–75 名区间，属于中上水平理工类高校；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度数据中未进入前 100 名，关注度一般，报考热度无明显异常信号；该校以地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势，相关专业在地矿行业有较强影响力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热，该校相关专业招生位次靠前；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年减少约 3.4%，竞争略有缓和；该校位于北京，对山西考生有较强地域吸引力；2025 年该校在山西省总招生 28 人（含文理），占全国总招生约 4.68%，属中等偏上比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年新高考选科分组导致位次后移的基准效应、2026 年计划扩招约 7.5% 缓解竞争、本省物理类考生减少约 3.4% 等因素，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 18480 名基础上略有后移但幅度有限；预测最低位次约 19050 名，区间 18600–19600 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 14013→13611→14608→12241→18480. In 2024, it significantly advanced to 12241, but in 2025, due to the new college entrance examination subject grouping (physics + chemistry group), the ranking dropped sharply to 18480, showing drastic fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 18480. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 94 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 104 in 2024, and 107 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 115, an increase of about 7.5% compared to 2025, indicating a relatively large expansion, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university. Soft Science main ranking is approximately 75th, with recent rankings stable in the 63–75 range, belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering universities. The school's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. In Douyin heat data, it did not enter the top 100, indicating general attention and no abnormal signals in application heat. The university has traditional strengths in geology, geological resources, and geological engineering, with related majors having strong influence in the mining industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation continue to be highly popular, with the university's related majors having higher admission rankings. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in the province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Located in Beijing, the university has strong regional appeal to Shanxi examinees. In 2025, the university enrolled a total of 28 students in Shanxi Province (including arts and sciences), accounting for about 4.68% of the national total, a moderately high proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline effect of the 2025 new college entrance examination subject grouping causing a ranking drop, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.5% easing competition, and the decrease in provincial physics category examinees by about 3.4%, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly drop from the 2025 baseline of 18480 but with limited magnitude. The predicted minimum ranking is about 19050, with a range of 18600–19600.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 18600–19600, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 18600), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 19600), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors, with Tier 3 majors as a stable choice.
